intentSynonyms: get a post thread in bsky
look up a post thread in bsky
fetch a single post thread in bsky
view one specific post thread in bsky
get a post and its reply thread in bsky
description: Get a post and its reply thread. Returns the root post and nested replies. Use depth to control how many levels of replies to fetch.

uri.description: AT URI of the post (e.g., at://did/app.bsky.feed.post/rkey)

depth.description: How many levels of replies to fetch (default 6, max 1000)

parent_height.description: How many levels of parent posts to fetch (default 80, max 1000)
